{"xenonPreset":1,"exportedAt":"","appVersion":"4.5.3","gridCols":24,"kind":"bundle","name":"Ambra","data":{"theme":{"appearance":"dark","styleMode":"glass","retroScanlines":false,"accent":"#e8a34c","background":"#14100c","text":"#f3ecdf","mutedText":"#a99a84","lineColor":"#c66a3c","dynamicAlbumTheme":false,"panelAlpha":0.5,"panelBorderStrength":0.9,"panelShadowStrength":1.1,"uiRoundness":0.7,"glassBlur":20,"glassSaturate":160,"bgDim":0.42,"bgBlur":0,"bgAurora":{"enabled":false,"intensity":40,"speed":30},"bgGrid":{"enabled":false,"color":"#c66a3c","intensity":40,"speed":50},"bgStatic":{"style":"none","intensity":70},"bgCustom":{"enabled":true,"name":"Bruma d'Ambra","code":"// Bruma d'Ambra — warm ember haze for the Ambra pack.\n// A deep espresso base with three slow-drifting warm glows (honey amber,\n// terracotta, muted ember) and a bounded field of warm motes rising like\n// dust in low sun. Calm and OLED-friendly: no strobing, no hard flashes,\n// O(fixed) work per frame, no per-frame array growth, no network.\n//\n// Contract: draw(ctx, t, w, h) — ctx is DPR-scaled (draw in CSS px), t is\n// seconds. Paint the full frame every time (the canvas is not auto-cleared).\n//\n// v2: the scene renders into a HALF-RESOLUTION offscreen canvas and is\n// stretched onto the real one. The haze is nothing but soft gradients, so the\n// upscale is invisible — but the four full-frame fills (base + three additive\n// glows) now touch a quarter of the pixels, and the one full-frame operation\n// left at native size is a plain image blit, which is far cheaper per pixel\n// than evaluating a gradient. Measured motivation: at native size this\n// background alone kept a core busy repainting a 30fps full-screen surface.\n\nconst CFG = {\n  base1: '#171009',            // espresso, top\n  base2: '#0c0805',            // deeper espresso, bottom\n  glowA: [232, 163, 76],       // honey amber   (the star)\n  glowB: [198, 106, 60],       // terracotta\n  glowC: [150, 92, 52],        // muted ember\n  mote: '255, 214, 150',       // warm mote colour (rgb only; alpha per mote)\n  moteCount: 46,\n  scale: 0.5,                  // offscreen render scale (see header note)\n};\n\nlet motes = [];\nlet off = null, octx = null, baseGrad = null;\n\nfunction init(w, h) {\n  // Seed once so the field is stable frame-to-frame (motion comes from t).\n  motes = Array.from({ length: CFG.moteCount }, () => ({\n    x: Math.random(),                       // 0..1 of width\n    y: Math.random(),                       // 0..1 of height\n    r: 0.6 + Math.random() * 1.9,           // radius px (in offscreen space)\n    sp: 0.006 + Math.random() * 0.012,      // rise speed (fraction of h / s)\n    drift: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.05,    // horizontal sway amplitude\n    ph: Math.random() * Math.PI * 2,        // phase offset\n    a: 0.12 + Math.random() * 0.30,         // base alpha\n  }));\n}\n\n// (Re)build the offscreen surface when the target size changes. The base\n// gradient only depends on the surface height, so it is rebuilt here and\n// reused every frame instead of being recreated per frame.\nfunction surface(w, h) {\n  const ow = Math.max(1, Math.round(w * CFG.scale));\n  const oh = Math.max(1, Math.round(h * CFG.scale));\n  if (!off || off.width !== ow || off.height !== oh) {\n    off = document.createElement('canvas');\n    off.width = ow; off.height = oh;\n    octx = off.getContext('2d');\n    baseGrad = octx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, oh);\n    baseGrad.addColorStop(0, CFG.base1);\n    baseGrad.addColorStop(1, CFG.base2);\n  }\n  return { ow, oh };\n}\n\n// One soft radial glow filling the frame (additive over the base).\nfunction glow(g2, w, h, cx, cy, rad, rgb, alpha) {\n  const g = g2.createRadialGradient(cx, cy, 0, cx, cy, rad);\n  g.addColorStop(0, `rgba(${rgb[0]},${rgb[1]},${rgb[2]},${alpha})`);\n  g.addColorStop(1, `rgba(${rgb[0]},${rgb[1]},${rgb[2]},0)`);\n  g2.fillStyle = g;\n  g2.fillRect(0, 0, w, h);\n}\n\nfunction draw(ctx, t, w, h) {\n  if (!motes.length) init(w, h);\n  const { ow, oh } = surface(w, h);\n\n  // Base espresso gradient — always paints the whole frame first.\n  octx.fillStyle = baseGrad;\n  octx.fillRect(0, 0, ow, oh);\n\n  // Warm glows, additive so they read as light, not paint. Positions drift on\n  // slow sine paths; radii breathe gently. All motion is a function of t.\n  octx.globalCompositeOperation = 'lighter';\n\n  const rad = Math.max(ow, oh);\n  glow(octx, ow, oh,\n    ow * (0.26 + Math.sin(t * 0.045) * 0.05),\n    oh * (0.30 + Math.cos(t * 0.037) * 0.06),\n    rad * (0.62 + Math.sin(t * 0.05) * 0.05),\n    CFG.glowA, 0.22);\n\n  glow(octx, ow, oh,\n    ow * (0.80 + Math.sin(t * 0.033 + 1.3) * 0.05),\n    oh * (0.66 + Math.cos(t * 0.041 + 0.6) * 0.05),\n    rad * (0.55 + Math.cos(t * 0.043) * 0.05),\n    CFG.glowB, 0.16);\n\n  glow(octx, ow, oh,\n    ow * (0.52 + Math.sin(t * 0.028 + 2.1) * 0.06),\n    oh * (1.02 + Math.sin(t * 0.05 + 0.4) * 0.03),\n    rad * 0.70,\n    CFG.glowC, 0.14);\n\n  // Rising motes — bounded, twinkling softly, wrapping at the edges. Drawn on\n  // the offscreen too: the upscale turns each one into a slightly softer speck,\n  // which suits dust in haze better than a hard-edged dot anyway.\n  for (const m of motes) {\n    const yy = ((m.y - t * m.sp) % 1 + 1) % 1;                 // rise + wrap\n    const xx = ((m.x + Math.sin(t * 0.12 + m.ph) * m.drift) % 1 + 1) % 1;\n    const tw = 0.55 + 0.45 * Math.sin(t * 0.7 + m.ph);         // gentle twinkle\n    octx.beginPath();\n    octx.arc(xx * ow, yy * oh, m.r, 0, Math.PI * 2);\n    octx.fillStyle = `rgba(${CFG.mote},${(m.a * tw).toFixed(3)})`;\n    octx.fill();\n  }\n\n  octx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';\n\n  // One native-size blit stretches the finished frame onto the real canvas.\n  ctx.drawImage(off, 0, 0, w, h);\n}\n","imported":true}},"widgets":[{"id":"ambra-meteo","name":"Ambra Meteo","surface":"tile","streams":["weather"],"actions":[],"hosts":[],"hooks":[],"payload":{"id":"ambra-meteo","files":[{"path":"index.html","data":""},{"path":"manifest.json","data":""},{"path":"widget.css","data":""},{"path":"widget.js","data":""}]}},{"id":"ambra-notte","name":"Ambra Notte","surface":"ambient","streams":["weather"],"actions":[],"hosts":[],"hooks":[],"payload":{"id":"ambra-notte","files":[{"path":"index.html","data":""},{"path":"manifest.json","data":""},{"path":"widget.css","data":""},{"path":"widget.js","data":""}]}}]}}
